testcase.name: YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > achieves reasonable Recall@10 on 5000 random 768D vectors (one_table)
testcase.system-out: RECALL_MEAN_ONE_TABLE 1.0000 F1_MEAN_ONE_TABLE 1.0000 Recall@10 stats: mean=1.0000, min=1.0000, max=1.0000 Dataset: 5000 points, 50 queries, 768D vectors

testcase.name: YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > creates collection, upserts points to global table, and performs search
YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > stores points in the global table with correct uid
YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > materializes qdrant_points_by_file rows and keeps ancestor rows after exact path delete
YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > isolates data between api-key namespaces using collection filtering in global table
YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > deletes only the collection's points from global table, not other collections
YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > deletes individual points from global table using uid filter
YDB integration with COLLECTION_STORAGE_MODE=one_table > rejects legacy layouts without embedding_quantized column (no automatic migrations)
